# zeam-sdk-ts

> Official TypeScript SDK for the Zeam Platform API Gateway.
> Secure-by-default, opinionated, and kept in lockstep with the gateway
> contract. Server-side only (Node 22+, Deno, Bun).

## Purpose

The SDK abstracts the gateway's two authentication tracks (Business OTP
and Connect SEP-10), its SPEC §18 response envelope, canonical error
codes, and the 9-step Connect off-ramp payment orchestration behind a
small set of typed TypeScript APIs.

## Public entry points

- `@zeammoney/sdk` — top-level `Client`, options, errors, environment.
- `@zeammoney/sdk/auth` — sessions, token store, OTP and SEP-10 flows,
  autorefresh.
- `@zeammoney/sdk/stellar` — narrow wrapper over the Stellar SDK
  (keypair, signer, asset).
- `@zeammoney/sdk/client/<domain>` — typed 1:1 clients for gateway
  endpoints.
- `@zeammoney/sdk/recipes` — opinionated end-to-end workflows.
- `@zeammoney/sdk/webhook` — inbound HMAC signature verification with
  replay protection.

## Non-public

- `src/internal/**` and `src/transport/**` are implementation details
  and may change without notice.

## Relationship to the gateway

The SDK exports `MIN_GATEWAY_VERSION` and performs a runtime handshake
against `/healthz` so a mismatched gateway fails fast. SDK `vA.B.C`
targets gateway `vA.B.≥0`.

## Docs

- Getting started: [docs/getting-started.md](docs/getting-started.md)
- Recipes: [docs/recipes.md](docs/recipes.md)
- Versioning policy: [docs/versioning.md](docs/versioning.md)
- Security policy: [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md)
